---
title: "figure-Ablation"
author: "Harry Robertson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 14,
  fig.height = 12,
  dpi = 600
)

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(ggpubr)

RESULTS <- "results"

# Main-text figure: composite ablation panel.
FIG_DIR  <- "main-figures"
# Supplementary: per-metric ablation bar+CI panels.
SUPP_DIR <- file.path("supp-figures", "ablation-figures")

walk(c(FIG_DIR, SUPP_DIR),
     ~ dir.create(.x, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE))

N_BOOT <- 10000
SEED   <- 42

source("./figure2-helpers.R")
```

```{r ablation-helpers}
# Mirror Figure4.Rmd: extend the palette and bypass should_skip() so CoT and
# vreason variants survive into the ablation comparisons.
# NB: keep model_label as character downstream — radar_plot/bar_with_ci look up
# colours via MODEL_PALETTE[unique(model_label)], and a factor would index by
# integer code instead of name (collapsing Base+CoT and Base+VReason onto the
# wrong palette slots). Alphabetical ordering of "Base", "Base + CoT",
# "Base + VReason" already matches the desired sequence.

MODEL_PALETTE <- c(
  MODEL_PALETTE,
  "Base"           = unname(MODEL_PALETTE[["Qwen2.5-VL 7B"]]),
  "Base + CoT"     = unname(MODEL_PALETTE[["Qwen3-VL 8B"]]),
  "Base + VReason" = unname(MODEL_PALETTE[["VReason"]])
)

ablation_label <- function(stem) {
  case_when(
    stem == "qwen2.5_vl_7b_instruct"     ~ "Base",
    stem == "qwen2.5_vl_7b_instruct_cot" ~ "Base + CoT",
    stem %in% c("vreason", "vreasson")   ~ "Base + VReason",
    TRUE ~ model_label(stem)
  )
}

load_ablation_per_sample <- function(directory) {
  csvs <- list.files(directory, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  csvs <- csvs[!grepl("summary\\.csv$", csvs)]

  frames <- map(csvs, function(p) {
    stem <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(p))
    df <- read_csv(p, show_col_types = FALSE)
    df$model       <- stem
    df$model_label <- ablation_label(stem)
    df
  })
  bind_rows(frames)
}
```

```{r ablation-data}
RG_RADAR_METRICS <- c(
  "bleu1", "bleu2", "bleu4",
  "meteor", "rougel", "cider",
  "bertscore", "semb_score", "radgraph_combined",
  "CE_precision",  "CE_recall",  "CE_f1",
  "CE5_precision", "CE5_recall", "CE5_f1"
)
ABL_RG_BAR_METRICS <- c("bleu4", "meteor", "rougel",
                        "bertscore", "semb_score", "radgraph_combined")
VQA_METRICS <- c("exact_match", "contains_match", "token_recall", "token_f1")

abl_mimic_ps      <- load_ablation_per_sample(file.path(RESULTS, "ablation/rg/mimic_cxr"))
abl_mimic_summary <- build_summary(abl_mimic_ps, RG_RADAR_METRICS)
abl_mimic_boot    <- compute_boot_cis(abl_mimic_ps, ABL_RG_BAR_METRICS)

abl_iu_ps      <- load_ablation_per_sample(file.path(RESULTS, "ablation/rg/iu_xray"))
abl_iu_summary <- build_summary(abl_iu_ps, RG_RADAR_METRICS)
abl_iu_boot    <- compute_boot_cis(abl_iu_ps, ABL_RG_BAR_METRICS)

abl_vqa_ps   <- load_ablation_per_sample(file.path(RESULTS, "ablation/vqa/slake"))
abl_vqa_boot <- compute_boot_cis(abl_vqa_ps, VQA_METRICS)
```

```{r supp-helpers}
make_supp_panels <- function(boot_df, metric_specs, supp_dir,
                             y_limits = c(0, 1)) {
  imap(metric_specs, function(metric, figure_name) {
    p <- bar_with_ci(boot_df, metric) +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
    if (!is.null(y_limits)) {
      p <- p + scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits,
                                  breaks = seq(y_limits[1], y_limits[2], 0.2))
    }
    ggsave(file.path(supp_dir, paste0(figure_name, ".pdf")),
           plot = p, width = 5, height = 4, device = "pdf")
    p
  })
}

save_supp_arranged <- function(plots, filename, supp_dir,
                               ncol, nrow, width, height) {
  arr <- ggarrange(plotlist = plots, ncol = ncol, nrow = nrow,
                   common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")
  ggsave(file.path(supp_dir, filename),
         plot = arr, width = width, height = height, device = "pdf")
  arr
}
```

# Supplementary panels — RG ablation (MIMIC-CXR + IU X-ray) and VQA ablation

```{r supp-mimic-rg}
mimic_specs <- c(
  figure4a_mimic_bleu4    = "bleu4",
  figure4b_mimic_meteor   = "meteor",
  figure4c_mimic_rougel   = "rougel",
  figure4d_mimic_bert     = "bertscore",
  figure4e_mimic_semb     = "semb_score",
  figure4f_mimic_radgraph = "radgraph_combined"
)
mimic_plots <- make_supp_panels(abl_mimic_boot, mimic_specs, SUPP_DIR)
save_supp_arranged(mimic_plots, "figure4a-f.pdf", SUPP_DIR,
                   ncol = 3, nrow = 2, width = 9, height = 7)
```

```{r supp-iu-rg}
iu_specs <- c(
  figure4g_iu_bleu4    = "bleu4",
  figure4h_iu_meteor   = "meteor",
  figure4i_iu_rougel   = "rougel",
  figure4j_iu_bert     = "bertscore",
  figure4k_iu_semb     = "semb_score",
  figure4l_iu_radgraph = "radgraph_combined"
)
iu_plots <- make_supp_panels(abl_iu_boot, iu_specs, SUPP_DIR)
save_supp_arranged(iu_plots, "figure4g-l.pdf", SUPP_DIR,
                   ncol = 3, nrow = 2, width = 9, height = 7)
```

```{r supp-vqa}
vqa_specs <- c(
  figure4m_vqa_exact_match    = "exact_match",
  figure4n_vqa_contains_match = "contains_match",
  figure4o_vqa_token_recall   = "token_recall",
  figure4p_vqa_token_f1       = "token_f1"
)
vqa_plots <- make_supp_panels(abl_vqa_boot, vqa_specs, SUPP_DIR)
save_supp_arranged(vqa_plots, "figure4m-p.pdf", SUPP_DIR,
                   ncol = 2, nrow = 2, width = 8, height = 7)
```

# Main figure — Ablation composite

```{r figure-Ablation-main, fig.width=14, fig.height=12}
p_abl_mimic <- radar_plot(
  abl_mimic_summary,
  RG_RADAR_METRICS,
  title = "MIMIC-CXR (RG ablation)",
  axis_limits = MIMIC_CXR_RADAR_LIMITS,
  label_size = 2.6,
  grid_label_size = 2.1
)

ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "figure4-mimic-cxr-ablation-radar.pdf"),
       plot = p_abl_mimic, width = 7, height = 7, device = "pdf")

p_abl_iu <- radar_plot(abl_iu_summary, RG_RADAR_METRICS,
                          title = "IU X-ray (RG ablation)")

rg_row <- (p_abl_mimic + p_abl_iu) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

vqa_row <- ggarrange(plotlist = vqa_plots, ncol = 4, nrow = 1,
                     common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")

figure_ablation <- ggarrange(
  rg_row, vqa_row,
  ncol = 1, nrow = 2,
  heights    = c(1.4, 1),
  labels     = c("A", "B"),
  font.label = list(size = 14, face = "bold")
)

ggsave(file.path(FIG_DIR, "figure-Ablation.pdf"),
       plot = figure_ablation, width = 14, height = 12, device = "pdf")

figure_ablation
```
